beIN SPORTS 2.title: Sporting CP vs Bodø / Glimt - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: With a three-goal deficit from the first leg, Sporting CP are facing what would be just the third time a Portuguese side have been eliminated by a Norwegian opponent in the knockout stages of a major European competition – previously União de Leiria v Molde  and Sporting CP themselves v Viking. Bodø/Glimt have a 100% record against Portuguese sides in European competition, with their first leg triumph over Sporting CP being the third different opponent they have beaten.

beIN SPORTS 2.original_title: Barcelona vs Newcastle United- UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 2.title: Barcelona vs Newcastle United- UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: Barcelona have won both of their previous home games against Newcastle United in the UEFA Champions League, beating them 1-0 in November 1997 and 3-1 in December 2002. Newcastle have lost five of their six away games against Spanish sides in all competitions, with this their first since a 2-1 loss at Deportivo de La Coruña in the 2005 UEFA Intertoto Cup. beIN SPORTS 1.title: Sporting CP vs Bodø / Glimt - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: With a three-goal deficit from the first leg, Sporting CP are facing what would be just the third time a Portuguese side have been eliminated by a Norwegian opponent in the knockout stages of a major European competition – previously União de Leiria v Molde  and Sporting CP themselves v Viking. beIN SPORTS 1.original_title: Arsenal vs Bayer Leverkusen - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 1.title: Arsenal vs Bayer Leverkusen - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: Arsenal remain unbeaten against Bayer Leverkusen in the UEFA Champions League, with their one victory over them coming on the only occasion they have hosted the German side: 4-1 at Highbury in February 2002. The latest of those eliminations did come under Mikel Arteta, however, losing on penalties to Sporting CP in the UEFA Europa League round of 16 in 2022-23.

beIN SPORTS 1.original_title: Barcelona vs Newcastle United- UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 1.title: Barcelona vs Newcastle United- UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg

beIN SPORTS 1.title: Bayern München vs Atalanta - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg

beIN SPORTS EN 1.title: Bayern München vs Atalanta - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc: Bayern Munich lost 2-1 at home to Internazionale in last season’s UEFA Champions League quarter-final – only once have they lost consecutive home games against Italian sides in the competition, doing so in October 2002/November 2004 against Milan and Juventus. Atalanta have lost just two of their seven away games against German teams in all competitions, with both defeats coming at Borussia Dortmund. This is their first ever visit to Bayern Munich.

beIN SPORTS EN 1.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc: Tottenham have won just three of their 16 meetings with Spanish sides in all European competition. The first of those was against Atlético Madrid, beating them 5-1 in the 1963 UEFA Cup Winners Cup final. Having lost just one of their first six UEFA Champions League away games against English sides, Atlético Madrid have now lost five of their last six visits to England. However, all three of their away wins against Premier League teams in the competition have come in the knockout stages.

beIN SPORTS EN 1.title: Midtjylland vs Nottingham Forest - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc: FC Midtjylland have won both of their two meetings with Nottingham Forest, both in this season’s UEFA Europa League – they could beat the same side three times in major European competition for the first time. This will be Nottingham Forest’s first ever trip to Denmark in major European competition – they have suffered late defeats in their two UEFA Europa League defeats to FC Midtjylland this season, in the 88th and 80th minutes at the City Ground.

beIN SPORTS EN 1.original_title: Aston Villa vs Lille - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS EN 1.title: Aston Villa vs Lille - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc: Aston Villa’s only previous time hosting Lille in major European competition came in the 2023-24 UEFA Conference League, winning 2-1 in the first leg of a quarter-final tie; the Villans lost 2-1 in the second leg but did eventually progress on penalties. Lille have never won on nine previous visits to England in major European competition, losing their last seven in a row since a 0-0 draw with Manchester United at Old Trafford in the 2005-06 UEFA Champions League group stage.

beIN SPORTS EN 1.title: Sporting CP vs Bodø / Glimt - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc: With a three-goal deficit from the first leg, Sporting CP are facing what would be just the third time a Portuguese side have been eliminated by a Norwegian opponent in the knockout stages of a major European competition – previously União de Leiria v Molde  and Sporting CP themselves v Viking. Bodø/Glimt have a 100% record against Portuguese sides in European competition, with their first leg triumph over Sporting CP being the third different opponent they have beaten.

beIN SPORTS EN 1.original_title: Arsenal vs Bayer Leverkusen - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS EN 1.title: Arsenal vs Bayer Leverkusen - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc: Arsenal remain unbeaten against Bayer Leverkusen in the UEFA Champions League, with their one victory over them coming on the only occasion they have hosted the German side: 4-1 at Highbury in February 2002. When avoiding defeat away from home in the first leg, Arsenal have progressed from 17 of their 20 two-legged knockout stage ties in major European competition. The latest of those eliminations did come under Mikel Arteta, however, losing on penalties to Sporting CP in the UEFA Europa League round of 16 in 2022-23.

beIN SPORTS EN 1.original_title: Arsenal vs Bayer Leverkusen - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS EN 1.title: Arsenal vs Bayer Leverkusen - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc: Arsenal remain unbeaten against Bayer Leverkusen in the UEFA Champions League, with their one victory over them coming on the only occasion they have hosted the German side: 4-1 at Highbury in February 2002. When avoiding defeat away from home in the first leg, Arsenal have progressed from 17 of their 20 two-legged knockout stage ties in major European competition. The latest of those eliminations did come under Mikel Arteta, however, losing on penalties to Sporting CP in the UEFA Europa League round of 16 in 2022-23.

beIN 4K.desc: Chelsea have won 11 of their last 12 Premier League home games against Newcastle  since a 2-0 loss in May 2012 under Roberto Di Matteo. Newcastle have avoided defeat in five of their last seven Premier League games against Chelsea, more times than they had in their previous 15.

beIN 4K.desc:
24 Grand Prix from the Formula 1 Season are live and exclusive only on beIN.

beIN 4K.title: Liverpool vs. Tottenham Hotspur - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc: Liverpool have lost just one of their last 31 home league games against Tottenham Hotspur, and are unbeaten in 14  since a 2-0 loss in May 2011.
